channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish all over pavement and grass verge since 15th May, 18th May
item.description:
There is an accumulation of rubbish on the pavement and grass verge on Bowes Road N11 1AT. Even though we are allocated street sweepers they do not pick up any rubbish but walk up the road doing nothing. I witness this every day. They hide behind the swimming pool and leave rubbish all over our pavements and grass verges unt. What exactly is our Council Tax paying for Enfield Council???
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bowes Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Giant hogweed near path in waterworks, 18th May
item.description:
This looks a lot like a giant hogweed sprouting right at the foot of the stairs in one of the waterworks pits, right opposite the pump enclosure and little pond.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Millfields Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 27 dyne road, 18th May
item.description:
Blocking the pavement , no space for pram

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dyne Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pathway, 18th May
item.description:
Mattress dumped on Charlton Park Lane. Please collect. This road has been become a weekly fly tipping destination. Very concerning and hazardous for pedestrians.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeatedly reported dumped corrugated material on path, 18th May
item.description:
I have repeatedly reported dumped corrugated materials on pathway of Charlton Park Lane. It has been there so long now - at least a month - that it’s started to break up into pieces which have now fragmented across the pavement. This led to me tripping over a piece of it this morning. Luckily I didn’t fall,although it has scuffed and torn my trainer. This is an accident waiting to happen. Hazzardous to pedestrians. Please collect urgently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture dumped on grass verge, 18th May
item.description:
Somebody has dumped old furniture on grass verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 160, Harland Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped furniture outside flat 30, 18th May
item.description:
Stop marking this resolved until you’ve picked up the fly tip!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major fly tipping at Haberdasher Place, 18th May
item.description:
Major fly tipping and excessive waste build up. Rats spotted as a result.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haberdasher Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on lamp post, 18th May
item.description:
Graffiti on lamp post out side our home. It is scruffy on a nice new lamp post.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silverdale Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees from the club behind, 18th May
item.description:
Tree branch now blocks view of people waiting for the bus. Busses do go past if you dont put your hand out depsite it not being a request stop so clear view is important

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still here, 18th May
item.description:
Not removed! 😠

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Unwin Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 18th May
item.description:
The pothole has been here for a few months now but is getting worse. Grateful if you could please investigate ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and addresses on the box, 18th May
item.description:
Fly tipping and addresses on the box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Corner trees if hawthorne road and mini round about of southborough, 18th May
item.description:
Trees weren't cut back enough in recent months when reported , now hang down over your face when its windy and dips lower

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hawthorne Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street weeds causing rubbish to collect, 18th May
item.description:
Hi The street weeds on both sides of Selby Rd need to be removed as look awful but also cos the weeds attract rubbish etc increasing the terrible litter problem in this area. They go all the way past Kenny's garage on both sides of road - thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner house, 18th May
item.description:
Keep reporting this only for it to be closed but now its been left so long its at face level. Its a yearly issue. Home owners should be on it before it starts hanging over the pathway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southlands Grove, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spray paint, 18th May
item.description:
On door entry panel. Peckham Rd entrance to Voltaire.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Homeless person possessions, 18th May
item.description:
This needs clearing away. A homeless person has been sleeping here. Possible drug taking and urination. The area needs clearing up and hosing down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish flytipped, 18th May
item.description:
These items need clearing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Botthels of gas non-recyclable, 18th May
item.description:
In the morning we find the bottels of gas and ballons as per images. The botteles are non-reciclable because they are gas canister hazardous waste possible nitroux oxide canister.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 199, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
